Event: Flower Hustle
Event Date: 01/01/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A173


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Nature's Heart

Triggers: When the unit health drops below critical

Rescue or Death?
When the health of the artifact owner or any ally drops below 50%, they have a 50% chance to restore 15% of their max health and remove all debuffs.
When an enemy's health drops below 50%, that enemy has a 50% chance to have their max health reduced by 20% for 3 sec. While this effect is active, that enemy takes 120000 magic damage each time a debuff is applied to them.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌗
